name: nightgauge-plugins
description: Official Nightgauge plugin for Claude Code - AI-ready development tools

plugins.name: nightgauge
plugins.description: AI-augmented SDLC. Each capability is a /nightgauge:<name> skill: the full issue-to-PR pipeline (issue-create, issue-pickup, feature-planning, feature-dev, feature-validate, pr-create, pr-merge), plus repository onboarding (smart-setup), documentation (update-docs, doc-gen, docs-write), and utilities (backlog-groom, project-sync, pipeline-audit, pipeline-health, pipeline-triage, pr-preflight, retro, queue, and more).
